creator: m.ne@gmx.net
text:
(In reply to Rainer Hurling from comment #15)
At least on my machine --pyqt-sip-dir=${PYQT_SIPDIR} does what you'd expect it to. To me it looks like it's either related to some changes in the FreeBSD13 branch, or you have some local changes in /usr/ports/Mk that somehow affect the variable expansion. Maybe you could make sure to try it on a clean (and up to date) ports tree, and if it still fails provide the full build log. Maybe that would help me pinpoint the underlying issue.
